codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly introduces the authenticated shell UI and retryable passkey error states. The Shell component includes the required header, logout, user display, bootstrap, and live channel status indicators. Passkey ceremony failures and cancellations are properly caught in App.svelte and displayed via AuthEntry without exposing the shell. Playwright tests thoroughly cover all specified behaviors.

summary: Review passed. The worker successfully implemented the shell UI and retryable passkey error states as requested, with comprehensive test coverage.
